sections.title: After The Giant Dwarf and if the player didn't join their company

lines.speaker: Silver Cog Director
lines.text: I'm too important to talk to the likes of you, leave.

lines.speaker: Silver Cog Director
lines.text: My secretary will deal with any inquiries you have about the Silver Cog.

lines.speaker: Silver Cog Director
lines.text: My secretary is sitting just over there, thank you.

lines.speaker: Silver Cog Director
lines.text: Today is not a good day, can you come back tomorrow?

lines.speaker: Silver Cog Director
lines.text: If you're looking for the market, it's downstairs.

lines.speaker: Silver Cog Director
lines.text: Do you mind? You're blocking my view.

lines.speaker: Silver Cog Director
lines.text: How did you get in here? I don't have time to talk to you!

lines.speaker: Silver Cog Director
lines.text: I can't help you, go and see my secretary.

lines.speaker: Silver Cog Director
lines.text: Talk to my secretary, I don't have time to deal with you.

lines.speaker: Silver Cog Director
lines.text: I told you to leave, human!
